user_prompt: search the web to fetch today's date and year

tasks.input_text: search the web to fetch today's date and year

tasks.system_prompt_template:
You are a URL provider. Given the intent, output ONLY the URL string to be used with the fetchWebContent tool to obtain today's date. For intent "fetch_date", return "https://worldtimeapi.org/api/timezone/Etc/UTC". For any other intent, return an empty string.

EXAMPLES:
Input intent: "fetch_date"
Output: https://worldtimeapi.org/api/timezone/Etc/UTC

Input intent: "none"
Output: 

Input intent: "unknown"
Output: 

---
Input: {intent_label}
Output:

You are a web fetcher. Use the fetchWebContent tool to retrieve the content at the provided URL. The tool result will be inserted below.

EXAMPLES:
URL: https://example.com
Fetched content: Example Domain

URL: https://worldtimeapi.org/api/timezone/Etc/UTC
Fetched content: {"datetime":"2026-04-08T12:34:56.789Z"}

URL: https://nonexistent.test
Fetched content: 

---
URL: {fetch_url}
Fetched content: {t4_fetchWebContent_result}
Output:
tasks.output: The URL you provided is not valid. Please provide a correct URL for me to fetch the content from.

tasks.description: Extract date and year from API response

context.t4_fetchWebContent_result: Failed to fetch web content: read ECONNRESET
context.fetched_content: The URL you provided is not valid. Please provide a correct URL for me to fetch the content from.

files.__stdout__: Today is [insert current date] and this year is [current year].
